root_cause_group: Case D - Frozen upstream artifact defect
root_cause_summary: The authoritative frozen bundle contains 2808 core rows and header-only defense/utility placeholders. No hidden three-workload package matching the approved 5400/2400/2400 design was located in Phase 4/Phase 4.5 evidence.
cell_count_note: The 19656 figure is a row-field count (2808 x 7), not a scientifically meaningful 10,200-row queue total.
semantic_conclusion: All core rows use IHR_SPCE because the frozen defense configuration resolves to that value.
